stemHtml: You are flying an aircraft with autopilot engaged and flight director ON with a heading of 160°. If you select a new heading of 180°, what would the vertical line on the FD show?

options.a: FD is centred if current bank angle is as per bank angle calculated from the flight firector computer
options.c: FD is centred if there is a 20° left drift
options.d: FD is centred if there is a 20° right drift
